preconditions: Authenticated user exists but target article does not exist.
expected_result: 404 Not Found and no comment row is persisted.
notes: Comment creation against a missing article is rejected before persistence, with no DB delta before or after the request.

description: Create reaction and verify DB state
preconditions: User and article exist, and there is no prior reaction for the articleId + userId pair.
steps: POST /api/reactions and verify before/after database state for the same articleId + userId pair.
expected_result: 1 record is inserted in the Reaction table, the articleId + userId combination exists exactly once, and the API summary reflects LIKE count 1.
compare: MATCH: status=200, beforeReactionCount=0, afterReactionCount=1, storedReaction=LIKE, likeCount=1, userReaction=LIKE
notes: Reaction mutation passed all three layers: API response, DB persistence, and aggregate summary side effect.

preconditions: User and published article exist, and the user has not bookmarked the article yet.
steps: POST /api/bookmarks, then GET /api/bookmarks, and verify before/after database state.
api_response: create=HTTP 201 {"success":true,"data":{"articleId":"ut_bookmark_db_article","bookmarked":true}}; list=HTTP 200 {"success":true,"data":[{"articleId":"ut_bookmark_db_article","title":"Bookmark DB assertion article","excerpt":"No excerpt available.","createdAt":"2026-04-08T08:34:05.684Z"}]}
expected_result: Bookmark record exists in DB with the correct userId and articleId, and the bookmark appears in the authenticated user's bookmark list.
compare: MATCH: createStatus=201, listStatus=200, beforeBookmarkCount=0, afterBookmarkCount=1, bookmarkExists=true, listedIds=["ut_bookmark_db_article"]
notes: Bookmark mutation passed API response, DB persistence, and list side effect verification.

preconditions: Published article exists and the acting user is authenticated.
steps: POST /api/articles/:articleId/comments and verify before/after comment persistence plus notification side effect.
expected_result: Comment is stored with the correct articleId and userId, and the article author receives one notification as a side effect.
compare: MATCH: status=201, beforeCommentCount=0, afterCommentCount=1, commentExists=true, beforeNotificationCount=0, afterNotificationCount=1
notes: Comment mutation passed API response, DB persistence, and notification side effect verification.

description: Reject article list with non-numeric pagination params
preconditions: Published articles exist and the endpoint is reachable.
api_response: HTTP 400 {"success":false,"error":{"message":"Limit must be an integer between 1 and 50"}}
expected_result: 400 Bad Request because skip and limit must be valid integers.
notes: Article pagination rejects non-numeric skip/limit values.

description: Reject comment list with empty pagination params
preconditions: Published article exists and the comments endpoint is reachable.
api_response: HTTP 400 {"success":false,"error":{"message":"Limit must be an integer between 1 and 50"}}
expected_result: 400 Bad Request because empty skip and limit query parameters are invalid.
notes: Comment pagination rejects empty skip/limit values.

description: Search uses default pagination when params are omitted
preconditions: Published search matches exist and the search endpoint is reachable.
steps: GET /api/search/articles?q=playbook without skip and limit query params.
api_response: HTTP 200 {"success":true,"data":{"query":"playbook","tag":null,"items":[{"id":"ut_search_default_two","title":"Playbook default search beta","excerpt":"No excerpt available.","highlightTerms":["playbook"],"publishedAt":"2026-04-08T10:00:00.000Z","views":0,"createdAt":"2026-04-08T08:34:06.466Z","updatedAt":"2026-04-08T08:34:06.466Z","score":1.399999976158142,"author":{"id":"ut_author_owner","name":"Author Owner"},"category":{"id":"ut_category_child","name":"Knowledge Base"},"tags":[]},{"id":"ut_search_default_one","title":"Playbook default search alpha","excerpt":"No excerpt available.","highlightTerms":["playbook"],"publishedAt":"2026-04-08T10:00:00.000Z","views":0,"createdAt":"2026-04-08T08:34:06.462Z","updatedAt":"2026-04-08T08:34:06.462Z","score":1.399999976158142,"author":{"id":"ut_author_owner","name":"Author Owner"},"category":{"id":"ut_category_child","name":"Knowledge Base"},"tags":[]}],"pagination":{"limit":10,"skip":0,"total":2,"hasMore":false,"nextSkip":null}}}
expected_result: 200 OK and default pagination values skip=0 and limit=10 are applied.
notes: Search pagination correctly falls back to default skip/limit when params are omitted.

description: Article list returns empty page when skip exceeds total records
preconditions: Published articles exist but requested skip is larger than the result set.
expected_result: 200 OK with an empty items array and no next page metadata when skip exceeds the total record count.
notes: Article pagination returns a stable empty page when skip exceeds the total record count.
